rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Avoid package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes unless explicitly visible in the model
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and their expressions
Do not encode AADL property references as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` with proper semicolon termination
anti_patterns: Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helpers in AGREE contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package or property set visibility
Implementation-level bindings or subcomponent port usage in type contracts
